description.value: Aura faint transmutation; CL 1st; Slot belt; Price 2,000 gp; Weight 3 lbs. DESCRIPTION Rather than being made of one continuous line of material, this belt consists of many bits of tanned leather joined together by thick metal studs. On command, the beltâs wearer can transform the belt into a single masterwork slashing and/or piercing melee weapon of her choice. As long as she is holding the weapon, she can also revert it back to belt form with a command. Furthermore, the belt can be enchanted like a piercing and slashing melee weapon, using the cost of the belt as the cost of the masterwork item. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, magic weapon; Cost 1,000 gp.
